payload:
SOLE Research Loop — self-organizing experiment pipeline.

ARCHITECTURE: SOLE (Structurally Orthogonal Latent Experts). All-modules LoRA, rank-16.
STATE: Read .ralph/current_direction.md for active work. Read HYPOTHESES.yml for full roadmap.
CONTEXT: See VISION.md (architecture), FINDINGS.md (proven results).

HOW TO PICK WORK:
1. Read HYPOTHESES.yml
2. Find all `open` nodes whose `depends_on` are ALL satisfied (status `proven` or `supported`)
3. If your prompt specifies a SCALE CONSTRAINT (e.... [truncated, 2554 chars total]
exp_order_sensitivity_cosine_threshold: K1 KILLED. Fixed cos=0.06 threshold is N-dependent. Real: cos_5pct(N) = 0.616*N^-0.935. SOLE safe at d=896 to ~N=5000.

exp_domain_taxonomy_generation: SUPPORTED. 270-domain taxonomy, K1 PASS (0.01% overlap vs 30% threshold, 3000x margin), K2 PASS (0% indistinguishable vs 20% threshold). Embedding overlap negligible. Hierarchy validated (within-cat 2.65x cross-cat cosine). Kill criteria too easy — embedding proxy, not training validation.

exp_domain_taxonomy_generation: REVISE (4 fixes). 1) Add negative control taxonomy (270 paraphrases of 30 domains). 2) Tighten kill criteria (K1: 5% at cos>0.5, K2: 5% at cos>0.7). 3) Validate 5-10 domains against pilot-50 trained expert weights. 4) Revert status to open until fixes land. See REVIEW-adversarial.md for details.

exp_domain_taxonomy_generation REVISED: 4 fixes applied. Negative control validates K2 (24.4x separation). Tightened criteria pass with meaningful margins (1.7x-11x vs 3000x). Embedding proxy r=0.034 honestly documented as non-predictive. Status: supported.

exp_domain_taxonomy_generation: supported. 270-domain taxonomy validated (K2 1.7x margin, negative control 24.4x). Embedding proxy non-predictive (r=0.034). Infrastructure artifact useful for expert planning.
exp_hash_function_load_balance: proven. xxHash32 mean R=1.170 vs FNV1a 2.175 at N=8 (1.86x improvement). FNV1a catastrophically bad at all scales. Recommend xxHash32 + V>=500 virtual nodes.

exp_hash_function_load_balance: supported. xxHash32 R=1.170 vs FNV1a 2.175 at N=8 (1.86x). K2 triggered at V=200, resolved at V>=500. Status supported (not proven) per reviewer. Next: pick eligible open node.

exp_end_to_end_cost_accounting: K1 PASS ($0.477/expert, 52% margin under $1.00). K2 KILL (4.61x overhead ratio, but entirely teacher API cost — SOLE ops are $0.00). Status: supported. Teacher-bound not GPU-bound. 8B teacher drops to $0.119/expert.
exp_end_to_end_cost_accounting: supported. $0.477/expert (K1 PASS, 52% margin). K2 KILL reinterpreted (teacher-dominated, not hidden overhead). SOLE ops $0.00. Adversarial review: PROCEED.

exp_symmetric_gs_cost_benefit: KILLED (both K1+K2 inverted). Symmetric GS strictly dominated — averaging orderings causes destructive interference in orthogonal residuals, -8.9% norm at cos=0.85. Any deterministic ordering is fine. Canonical sort by expert ID is zero-cost optimal. GS ordering investigation closed.

exp_symmetric_gs_cost_benefit: KILLED (review PROCEED). Symmetric GS strictly dominated — destructive interference loses 9% norm at cos=0.85. Any deterministic ordering fine (CV=0.12%). Canonical sort by expert ID is zero-cost optimal. GS ordering investigation closed. consecutive_kills=1.

exp_clone_compete_evolution: Clone-and-compete evolution mechanism. SPEC at macro/clone_compete_evolution/SPEC.md. 7 fixes needed to existing run_clone_compete.py (data overlap, answer-conditioned scoring, effect sizes, statistical tests, SIGALRM/CUDA). Estimated cost ~/bin/zsh.20. Novel: no prior work on clone-and-compete for LoRA adapters.

task_id=run_clone_compete_1773796306, experiment=exp_clone_compete_evolution, script=macro/clone_compete_evolution/run_clone_compete.py, queue_position=4, 7_fixes_applied: data_split_overlap, answer_conditioned_ppl, cohens_d, improvement_pct, wilcoxon_test, sigalrm_removed, try_finally_cleanup.
